It looks as if - or - A possibility is that an older theory that was discarded a few years ago may be the right one, that the Cayley is an outer fluidized ejecta from Imbrium.
Fra Mauro would be an inner ring, and then Imbrium sculpture would be outside of that, and then the Cayley would be sort of slosh that filled up all the valleys farther on out.
But some of the questions that the geologists are - are pressing here is something that might help them define that.
And a lot of it is that they're just - can't wait for the rocks to get back.

The North Ray had - something had - either they're older or something, but they were a lot more subdued and there was less blocks around.
